records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Bewitched (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Bewitching.]

defs: To gain an ascendency over by charms or incantations; to affect (esp. to injure) by witchcraft or sorcery.
quotes: See how I am bewitched; behold, mine arm Is like a blasted sapling withered up.

defs: To charm; to fascinate; to please to such a degree as to take away the power of resistance; to enchant.
quotes: The charms of poetry our souls bewitch.
